research_front: CO2 x Decision Quality (K-ATLAS Q16) + adjacent IAQ/cognition

questions.question: What experimental evidence shows that indoor CO2 above 1000 ppm impairs strategic decision-making in adult office workers, and which populations have been tested?
questions.expected_yield: 5-8 cited primary sources, >=3 already in corpus

questions.question: Are there meta-analyses or systematic reviews on indoor air quality (CO2, PM2.5) effects on cognitive performance in office or classroom settings published since 2020?
What is the dose-response relationship between outdoor-air ventilation rate and worker cognitive performance, and at what ventilation rate do returns diminish?
How does combined exposure to elevated indoor temperature and elevated CO2 affect cognitive performance compared to either factor alone?
What papers cite Satish et al. 2012 (Environmental Health Perspectives) and report null or contradictory results?
What is the lowest indoor CO2 concentration at which adult decision-making performance has been shown to decline in randomized controlled chamber studies?
Do studies using the Strategic Management Simulation replicate decision-making decrements at 1000 ppm CO2 across populations beyond Satish 2012?
What effect sizes have been reported for the relationship between mechanical-ventilation rate (cfm/person) and Stroop or n-back performance in office settings?
Across longitudinal observational studies of office workers, what effect size has been reported for IQR-increase in PM2.5 on Stroop response time?
What experimental studies have measured cognitive performance under combined perturbations of indoor CO2, temperature, and humidity, and what extracted moderator effects do they report?
Does elevated indoor CO2 cause measurable cognitive decrements in healthy adults at concentrations below 2000 ppm?
Does indoor PM2.5 exposure degrade decision-making quality independently of CO2 in office or classroom settings?
Does increasing outdoor-air ventilation rate above ASHRAE minima improve cognitive performance in office workers?
Do indoor temperatures outside the 21-23 C comfort range degrade decision-making in office workers?
Does CO2 inhalation at 1000-2500 ppm impair attention as measured by the Stroop test?

questions.boolean_query: ("Strategic Management Simulation"[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB] OR ventilation[TIAB])
questions.question: All Strategic Management Simulation studies that manipulate or measure CO2 / ventilation.

questions.boolean_query: (Wargocki P[Author] OR Allen JG[Author] OR Satish U[Author] OR MacNaughton P[Author] OR Herbig B[Author]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR ventilation[TIAB] OR IAQ[TIAB]) AND ("2020"[PDAT] : "3000"[PDAT])
questions.question: Recent (2020+) work by anchor authors on CO2 / ventilation / IAQ.

questions.boolean_query: ("ventilation rate"[TIAB] OR "outdoor air"[TIAB]) AND ("Cognition"[Mesh] OR "Cognitive Function"[TIAB] OR Stroop[TIAB])
questions.question: Ventilation x cognition with MeSH-broadened cognition vocabulary.

questions.boolean_query: (PM2.5[TIAB] OR "particulate matter"[TIAB]) AND ("cognitive performance"[TIAB] OR "executive function"[TIAB]) AND ("office"[TIAB] OR "classroom"[TIAB] OR "indoor"[TIAB]) NOT (animal*[TIAB] OR mouse*[TIAB] OR mice[TIAB] OR rat[TIAB])
questions.question: Indoor PM2.5 x cognition in human office/classroom populations.

questions.boolean_query: ("indoor environmental quality"[TIAB] OR IEQ[TIAB] OR "thermal comfort"[TIAB]) AND (Stroop[TIAB] OR "n-back"[TIAB] OR "decision-making"[TIAB] OR EEG[TIAB]) AND (office[TIAB] OR worker*[TIAB] OR classroom[TIAB])
questions.question: IEQ/thermal x canonical cognitive instruments in worker/student populations.
